intro: I believe having a good code repo is a necessary part of a good paper. You can find the source code for my papers and other interesting projects through my [Github](https://github.com/dixiyao).
huggingFace: I also share some interesting spaces, models, and datasets I created during my past projects on my [Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/dixiyao).

items.title: Build a ChatBot Application with Own Data Using Unsloth and RAG
Finetune a Large Language Model with Torchtune
LLM for Academic Writing
items.description: This is a collection of helpful LLM tools I have found and developed. They leverage large generative models to improve academic writing.

items.title: Plato
items.description: A New Framework for Scalable Federated Learning Research.

items.title: Edge-Cloud Computing Framework
items.description: An edge-cloud computing framework across IoT devices and a public cloud server for deep learning models.

items.title: Automatic Tooth Extraction System
items.description: A system developed upon UR5 and Python, navigating the robotic arm to automatically plan and conduct the tooth extraction surgery.

items.title: SpecNet
items.description: Replication of a series of networks completely training and inferencing over spectral/frequency domain.

items.title: Non-IID Dataset Creator
items.description: An interface to create non-i.i.d. datasets quickly in federated learning.

items.title: Hirschberg Editing Distance
items.description: A C++ implementation of Hirschberg editing distance

sections.title: Useful Resources
sections.content: I would like to share some useful references during my research experience. Please kindly check them.

sponsor.text: If you like my projects, sponsorship is welcome!
